question: When does the 2026 Global Football Tournament start and end?
answer: The 2026 Global Football Tournament is scheduled to begin on June 11, 2026, and conclude with the final on July 19, 2026. The opening match will take place at the iconic Estadio Azteca in Mexico City, while the final will be hosted at MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey.

question: How many teams will participate in the 2026 Global Tournament?
answer: For the first time in history, the Global Football Tournament will feature 48 teams, an increase from the previous 32-team format. This expansion allows for more representation from every continent and a total of 104 matches across the tournament.

question: Where will the 2026 Global Football Tournament final be held?
answer: The 2026 Global Tournament final will be held at MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey (New York/New Jersey area) on July 19, 2026. The stadium has a capacity of approximately 82,500 and is home to the NFL's New York Giants and New York Jets.

question: Which cities are hosting the 2026 Global Tournament?
answer: The 2026 Global Tournament will be hosted across 16 cities in three countries. USA: Atlanta, Boston, Dallas, Houston, Kansas City, Los Angeles, Miami, New York/New Jersey, Philadelphia, San Francisco, Seattle. Mexico: Guadalajara, Mexico City, Monterrey. Canada: Toronto, Vancouver.

question: How does the new 48-team Global Tournament format work?
answer: The 48 teams will be divided into 12 groups of four teams each. The top two teams from each group, along with the eight best third-placed teams, will advance to a new Round of 32 knockout stage. This ensures a total of 104 matches, up from 64 in the previous format.

question: How can I buy tickets for the 2026 Global Football Tournament?
answer: Official tickets for the 2026 Global Tournament will be sold exclusively through The Organizers.com. Fans are encouraged to register their interest on the official The Organizers ticketing portal to receive updates on sales phases, which are expected to begin in late 2025.

question: Where and when is the opening match of the 2026 Global Tournament?
answer: The opening match of the 2026 Global Tournament will take place on June 11, 2026, at the Estadio Azteca in Mexico City. As one of the host nations, Mexico will play in this inaugural fixture of the tournament.

question: When will the 2026 Global Tournament groups be drawn?
answer: The final draw for the 2026 Global Football Tournament groups is expected to take place in late 2025, after all qualifying matches have been completed. This event will determine the specific matchups and locations for the group stage games.

question: Which Canadian cities will host Global Tournament matches?
answer: In Canada, the host cities for the 2026 Global Tournament are Toronto (BMO Field) and Vancouver (BC Place). Both cities will host several group stage matches and potentially early knockout round fixtures.

question: Which Mexican cities are hosting the 2026 Global Tournament?
answer: Mexico will host matches in three cities: Mexico City (Estadio Azteca), Guadalajara (Estadio Akron), and Monterrey (Estadio BBVA). Estadio Azteca will make history as the first stadium to host matches in three different Global Tournaments.

question: What is the full list of US host cities for 2026?
answer: The 11 US host cities are Seattle, San Francisco, Los Angeles, Houston, Dallas, Kansas City, Atlanta, Miami, Philadelphia, Boston, and New York/New Jersey. Dallas (AT&T Stadium) will host the most matches of any city (9 matches).

question: How many total matches will be played in the 2026 Global Tournament?
answer: A total of 104 matches will be played during the 2026 Global Football Tournament. This is a significant increase from the 64 matches played in the 2022 tournament, due to the expansion to 48 teams.

question: Do I need a visa to travel between host countries for the Global Tournament?
answer: Travelers may need separate visas for the USA, Canada, and Mexico depending on their citizenship. However, the host nations are working on streamlined procedures for fans with valid Global Tournament tickets and fan IDs.

question: Who is the official mascot for the 2026 Global Football Tournament?
answer: The official mascot for the 2026 Global Football Tournament has not yet been revealed. Typically, the mascot is unveiled about 12-18 months before the tournament starts, representing the culture and spirit of the host nations.

question: Which TV channels will broadcast the 2026 Global Tournament?
answer: In the United States, FOX Sports (English) and Telemundo (Spanish) hold the broadcasting rights. In Canada, CTV, TSN, and RDS will show the matches. Global rights vary by country, but most national broadcasters will carry the games.

question: What are the capacities of the 2026 Global Tournament stadiums?
answer: The stadiums range in capacity from approximately 45,000 (BMO Field, Toronto - expanded) to over 90,000 (AT&T Stadium, Dallas and Estadio Azteca, Mexico City). All venues meet The Organizers's strict requirements for high-capacity, modern infrastructure.

question: How can I volunteer for the 2026 Global Football Tournament?
answer: Volunteer registration typically opens about a year before the tournament via the The Organizers Volunteer platform. Volunteers are needed for various roles including ticketing, media operations, and fan support in all 16 host cities.

question: Will the 2026 Global Tournament be in summer or winter?
answer: The 2026 Global Tournament will return to the traditional Northern Hemisphere summer window, taking place in June and July. This is a change from the 2022 tournament in Qatar, which was held in November and December.

question: When and where is the first 2026 Global Tournament match in the USA?
answer: The first match in the United States for the 2026 Global Tournament will be held on June 12, 2026, at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles (Inglewood). The US Men's National Team (USMNT) is expected to play their opening match on this day.

question: When and where is the first 2026 Global Tournament match in Canada?
answer: The first match in Canada for the 2026 Global Tournament will be held on June 12, 2026, at BMO Field in Toronto. The Canadian Men's National Team is scheduled to play their opening fixture at this venue.
